changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: delete from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map where scope_id in (select id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope where uri_pattern IN ('get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/marketLeaderList', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/profile/{marketLeaderId}', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/dailyProfitLossRatio', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/periodicProfitLossRatio', 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/subscriberGrowthRate'));

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map(scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/marketLeaderList' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/profile/{marketLeaderId}' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/periodicProfitLossRatio' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/dailyProfitLossRatio' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API' UNION ALL SELECT s.id, sg.id from `tradex-configuration`.t_scope s, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group sg where s.uri_pattern = 'get:/api/v1/copyTrading/marketLeader/subscriberGrowthRate' and sg.scope_group_name = 'NHSV_API';
